description: Smallest AI provides AI voice products, including Lightning text-to-speech, Pulse speech-to-text, the Hydra speech-to-speech model, and Atoms, a platform for building and operating AI voice agents that make and receive phone calls.
summary: Smallest AI exposes documented REST APIs under https://api.smallest.ai/ — the Waves speech endpoints (Lightning TTS, Pulse STT) and the Atoms voice-agent platform API — authenticated with a Bearer API key, plus an official npm-distributed stdio MCP server (@developer-smallestai/smallest-mcp-server) that authenticates with the same API key; it does not expose a public remote MCP endpoint or GraphQL API.
